title: VeloraOS 1.9.5 - Accessibility Closeout
releaseNotes: Adds screen-reader landmarks, live regions, labels and current-state semantics.
Adds keyboard focus restoration, focus trapping and arrow-key menu navigation.
Adds stronger focus, contrast, forced-colour and reduced-motion support.
Preserves mobile viewing, installed-only models, SVG branding, user data and licensing security.
